plan_type_rationale: Single-site change in graph-builder.ts + one paired invariant test. No phases needed.

tasks.description: Read src/pipeline/graph-builder.ts L230-295 (buildNodes function). Confirm exact lines of file-grain pseudo-node emission block and the element-grain headerStatus stamp pattern at L252.
tasks.success_criteria: Exact lines confirmed. Change site identified.

tasks.description: In buildNodes(), before the seenFiles loop that emits file-grain nodes (L281-290): build a Map<file, HeaderStatus> from state.elements (first-seen-wins, same policy as buildFileHeaderStatusMap). Then in the file-grain node push, add headerStatus from the map if present: metadata.headerStatus = fileHeaderStatus.get(file).
tasks.success_criteria: File-grain pseudo-nodes in graph output carry headerStatus when the file has elements with a defined headerStatus. Files with no elements omit headerStatus.

tasks.description: Add paired invariant test: load the frozen-fixture graph.json after indexing; assert that file-grain nodes (type='file', metadata.fileGrain=true) for files that have elements carry a non-undefined headerStatus. Assert count > 0.
tasks.success_criteria: New test PASS. DR-PHASE-7-B satisfied: new field has paired invariant test.
